core_concept: 結合數位藝術與傳統媒介的創意生物設計
visual_elements: 像素藝術風格的生物形態
傳統油畫質感的生物皮膚
composition_hint: 將生物主體以對角線構圖置於畫面中央，搭配背景的數位噪點與傳統畫布紋理形成視覺對比
potential_subjects: A cybernetic creature with pixelated skin and organic patterns
A 3D modeled beast with hand-painted textures
A vector-based monster with retro circuit patterns
original_excerpt:
WELCOME TO THE SCP FOUNDATION
ARTIST DIRECTORY
This page serves as a directory of artist pages showcasing the work of artists who have contributed to the SCP Wiki. It acts as a way for readers to easily find more work by a given artist, as portfolios showcasing each artist's work can be found at a glance.
+ How to add yourself to this page
- How to add yourself to this page
If you have a portfolio of work you'd like to showcase in the SCP Wiki, you can create an artist page!
The SCP Wiki is home
